{{Quote|Rees Alrix was my first. She is fighting with the clone troops at Sullust.|Maks Leem about her Padawans to Grand Master Yoda|<ref name="Y:DR" />}}
'''Rees Alrix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Alrix was the first [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]], and she later left her tutelage and became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and plunged the Republic into a war, Alrix, like many Jedi, fought in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="Y:DR" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> she led her [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the [[Battle of Sullust (Republic traitor)|Battle of Sullust]].<ref name="Y:DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rees Alrix was first mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="Y:DR" />
